register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Join BG Defender and start learning cybersecurity.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your BG Defender account.
login.failed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we will send you a secure link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: Password reset link sent! Check your email for further instructions.
forgotPassword.infoMessage: If an account with this email exists, you will receive password reset instructions.
forgotPassword.successMessage: Check your email for password reset instructions. The link expires in 1 hour.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully reset. Redirecting to login...
resetPassword.errorExpired: The reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset.
resetPassword.failed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: The reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset.
resetPassword.infoMessage: Make sure your new password is different from your previous password.

password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.noUppercase: Password must contain at least 1 uppercase letter
password.noNumber: Password must contain at least 1 number

alerts.invalidResetLinkMessage: This password reset link is no longer valid. Links expire after 1 hour for security.
alerts.sessionExpiredMessage: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
alerts.accountCreatedMessage: Your account has been successfully created! Redirecting to login...
alerts.passwordResetSuccessMessage: Your password has been successfully reset! Redirecting to login...
alerts.samePasswordMessage: Your new password must be different from your current password.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your profile details and keep your account secure.
account.profileDescription: Update the details that appear around your learning space.
account.securityDescription: Change your password whenever you want to refresh your account security.
account.passwordRuleHint: Use at least 8 characters, including one uppercase letter and one number.

unauthorized.title: Access denied
unauthorized.description: You do not have permission to access this resource. If you believe this is an error, please contact support.
